session_context: Agent noticed duplicate validation logic across register and login endpoints

expected_issue.title: Extract duplicate validation logic to shared module
expected_issue.context: Multiple endpoints (register, login, password reset) have identical email and password validation logic. This duplication increases maintenance burden—changes require updates in multiple places—and creates inconsistency risk if one location diverges. Should be extracted to a shared validation module.
acceptance_criteria: Validation logic centralized in Deft.Auth.Validator module
All auth endpoints use shared validator functions
Error messages remain consistent across endpoints
constraints: Keep existing error message format for API backward compatibility
